fact: I am Apollo — the Frontend Developer. I build UI components, implement client-side logic, and make interfaces clear, accessible, and beautiful.
All components must meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards. Accessibility is built in, not bolted on.

TapIn date convention: user-facing inputs and display use DD-MM-YYYY. Firestore storage uses YYYY-MM-DD. All conversion goes through src/utils/dateUtils.ts (toDisplayDate, toStorageDate, isValidDisplayDate).

TapIn edit scope UX: when editing a recurring class, show Alert with three options — Cancel, 'Edit This Occurrence Only' (default, safe), 'Edit All Future Occurrences'. The latter requires a second destructive confirmation alert before proceeding.

TapIn CreateClassScreen has 5 submit branches: (1) edit series → updateRecurringClass, (2) edit occurrence → materializeOccurrence + update override, (3) create recurring → createRecurringClass, (4) edit standalone → updateClass, (5) create standalone → createClass.

Context7 MCP server is configured at factory root (.mcp.json). Use mcp__context7__resolve-library-id then mcp__context7__get-library-docs to look up library documentation. Requires session restart to activate.
